stonetop.summary: One of the last thirteen ice-gods, in eternal stasis, weaving the glacier that binds Y'aaw'kara.

system.concept: One of the last thirteen ice-gods, in eternal stasis, weaving the glacier that binds Y'aaw'kara.
system.description: Only thirteen Rime Lords survive; each remains in stasis in some key place of power. Their spirits are merged in an eternal dance and song, continuously weaving the dark-ice glacier that keeps the voice of Y'aaw'kara bound and prevents madness from spreading unchecked across the world. Pray, o mortal — pray that they continue their vigil, that their wills do not falter, that no interloper is so foolish as to disturb them. Pray that they do not wake.
